PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\Fang2\\Desktop\\polimi\\III anno\\software\\progetto\\Event-Character\\am22\\src\\main\\resources\\images\\icons"; $tmp = "$src\\_test_convert"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tmp -Force | Out-Null; Add-Type -AssemblyName PresentationCore; try { $stream = [IO.File]::OpenRead\("$src\\icon_food.png"\); $dec = [System.Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapDecoder]::Create\($stream, [System.Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapCreateOptions]::PreservePixelFormat, [System.Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapCacheOption]::Default\); $frame = $dec.Frames[0]; $enc = New-Object System.Windows.Media.Imaging.PngBitmapEncoder; $enc.Frames.Add\([System.Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapFrame]::Create\($frame\)\); $out = [IO.File]::OpenWrite\("$tmp\\icon_food.png"\); $enc.Save\($out\); $out.Close\(\); $stream.Close\(\); Write-Host "OK"; Get-Item "$tmp\\icon_food.png" | Format-List Length,Name } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($javaHome = $env:JAVA_HOME; if \(-not $javaHome\) { $java = Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($java\) { $javaHome = \(Split-Path \(Split-Path $java.Source -Parent\) -Parent\) } }; "JAVA_HOME=$javaHome"; if \($javaHome\) { Test-Path "$javaHome\\bin\\javac.exe" })
